pages.image_tooltip: A gigantic sea scorpion, Hibbertopterus spends its time sifting through sediment, enriching the soil in the process.

pages.feature_1.tooltip: Hibbertopterus’ home is the water, but it can survive indefinitely on land—the only thing it cannot do yet is fly
pages.feature_1.title: All-Terrain
pages.feature_2.tooltip: Hibbertopterus is not at all concerned with players climbing on its back, and one can even command it to till vast areas of farmland with §aDirt on a Stick§7
pages.feature_2.title: No Thoughts, Only Plow
